runners.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 6th over 330m at this track beaten 13 lengths (19.71) behind Paw Hart in a Grade 5 on April 8. Last couple have been below par. Deserves another chance.

runners.formComment: Well supported here last start but let backers down, finishing finished last in a Grade 5 on March 20 over 320m at Richmond behind Sydneysider beaten 12 lengths (19.11). Placed two back at Richmond. Some good form is emerging from that last run. Expected to prove hard to beat.
